zh.title: 时间空间化：排序任务
zh.description: 探索你如何在空间中表征时间概念。
zh.question:
想象有三个事件：
- 上周的一次聚会
- 今天的午餐
- 下周的一个会议

如果让你把这三个事件在空间中排列，你会怎么摆放？

请描述你脑中的排列方式。
options: 水平排列：过去在左，未来在右
水平排列：过去在右，未来在左
垂直排列：过去在上，未来在下
垂直排列：过去在下，未来在上
zh.hint: 不同语言使用者对时间的空间表征往往不同——中文使用者常用垂直隐喻（上/下），而英文使用者常用水平隐喻（前/后）。

en.title: Time Spatialization: Arrangement Task
en.description: Explore how you represent time concepts in space.
en.question:
Imagine three events:
- A party last week
- Today's lunch
- A meeting next week

If you had to arrange these three events in space, how would you place them?

Please describe the arrangement in your mind.
options: Horizontal: Past on left, Future on right
Horizontal: Past on right, Future on left
Vertical: Past on top, Future on bottom
Vertical: Past on bottom, Future on top
en.hint: Different language speakers often represent time differently in space — Chinese speakers often use vertical metaphors (up/down), while English speakers use horizontal (before/after).

reference: Boroditsky, L. (2001). Does language shape thought? Mandarin and English speakers' conceptions of time
